task_completion.description: Select the target volume in VeraCrypt
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt main window is visible with the volume path '/home/ga/Volumes/legacy_project.hc' entered or selected in the volume field.

task_completion.description: Open the Change Volume Password dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Change Password or Keyfiles' dialog box is open in VeraCrypt.
In the 'Current' section of the dialog, the password field contains masked input (dots/asterisks) and the PIM field is explicitly set to '485'.

task_completion.description: Enter the new target volume parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'New' section of the dialog, the password field contains masked input, the 'PKCS-5 PRF' dropdown is set to 'HMAC-SHA-512', and the PIM field is set to '0' (or left blank for default).

task_completion.description: Generate random pool for the new header
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt Random Pool Enrichment window is visible, showing a progress bar for gathering entropy via mouse movements.

task_completion.description: Confirm the volume parameters were successfully changed
task_completion.visual_evidence: A VeraCrypt popup dialog is visible displaying a success message indicating that the volume password/parameters have been successfully changed.

integrity.description: Agent did not use CLI commands to bypass the GUI requirement
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal window does not show execution of VeraCrypt command-line arguments like '--change-password' or '-C'.

integrity.description: Dialogs and success messages are genuine
